name: plain alternatives: plain explanations are present across every category
command:
cat > h.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"aws","iac_targets":["terraform"]}
JEOF
cat > req.json <<'JEOF'
{"pillars":{"integration":[{"concern":"message_queue"}]}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff h.json --requirements req.json --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tc.json","utf8"));const R=j.recommendations;const ALL=R.flatMap(r=>r.alternatives);const cat=c=>R.find(r=>r.category===c);const alt=(c,t)=>cat(c).alternatives.find(a=>a.tool===t);process.exit(R.every(r=>(r.alternatives||[]).every(a=>a.plain&&a.plain.length>10))?0:1)' && echo all-categories 1>&2
